scripts.build: npm run gaga:sync-components && npm run store:build && npm run gaga:template:pack && node tools/cloudflare-prepare.mjs
scripts.gaga:handoff:audit: npm run gaga:handoff:pack && npm run gaga:audit -- dist/gg-handoff.zip
scripts.store:check: npm run store:build && npm run store:proof
scripts.store:check:ci: GG_STORE_MODE=ci STORE_CI=1 STORE_REQUIRE_LIVE_FEED=0 STORE_STRICT_IMAGES=0 npm run store:check
scripts.store:check:dev10: npm run store:check:ci && npm run build && bash qa/store-artifact-smoke.sh
scripts.store:check:production: GG_STORE_MODE=production STORE_CI=1 STORE_PRODUCTION=1 STORE_REQUIRE_LIVE_FEED=0 STORE_STRICT_IMAGES=1 npm run store:check
scripts.ci:store: npm run store:check:ci && npm run build && bash qa/store-artifact-smoke.sh
scripts.ci:cloudflare: npm run ci:store && npm run ci:qa && bash -n qa/live-smoke-worker.sh
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build && node tools/cloudflare-deploy.mjs deploy
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:dry: npm run build && node tools/cloudflare-deploy.mjs dry-run
